title: dianthus × hellwigii
intro: Dianthus × hellwigii, also known as the Scarlet Flame or Scarlet Flare, is a hybrid flowering plant in the carnation family, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and delicate, fern-like foliage. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dianthus × hellwigii include its potential to reduce symptoms of fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against certain types of infections. Dianthus × hellwigii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes used in traditional folk medicine to support overall well-being.
